name: Cardiff Lexington Corp
business: Cardiff Lexington Corp is a targeted healthcare holding company that acquires and builds middle-market niche healthcare clinics, primarily in orthopedics, spine care, and pain management. All current revenue is derived from its subsidiary Nova, which operates facilities in Florida and Georgia providing diagnostic and surgical services to traumatic injury victims, focusing on plaintiff-related care for uninsured patients. The company also owns a real estate subsidiary, Edge View, holding undeveloped land in Idaho.
sellsTo: uninsured patients in personal injury lawsuits
insurance carriers (bodily injury, general liability, personal injury protection policies)

exposures.sentence: We provide a full range of diagnostic and surgical services for injuries and disorders of the skeletal system and associated bones, joints, tendons, muscles, ligaments, and nerves.
